notes: Chunk contains a single event: 10-K MD&A part 2 of 5 (results of operations, segments, non-GAAP reconciliations, liquidity intro); no fiscal_kpis in this chunk.
All 37 evidence quotes verified verbatim as substrings of the event content before writing.

Skipped (8): insurance expense line (attribution is mainly lapping the lawsuit settlement, covered by wage_hour_litigation); South Korea franchise sales decline (table-only, no causal prose); off-premises channel mention (no causal claim); gift card breakage (exclusion mention only); plain restaurant_sales top line (decomposed into more specific comps/closures/openings drivers); strategic initiative consulting fees (vague 'strategic initiative', one-off project); convertible note hedge/warrant share dilution mechanics (share-count mechanics, instance-bound); noncontrolling interests (immaterial, no causal prose).
debt_repayment and dividend_payout share one strategy sentence; treated as two independent causal variables per R2.
